collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (2 total Queries, 2 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT `name`, `brand`, `category`, MIN(price) as min_price, MAX(price) as max_price, SUM(stock_qty) as total_stock, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN flavor IS NOT NULL AND flavor != "" THEN flavor END) as flavors, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN puffs IS NOT NULL THEN puffs END ORDER BY puffs) as puff_counts, MIN(image_url) as image_url, COUNT(*) as variant_count FROM `products` WHERE `is_active` = 1 GROUP BY `name`, `brand`, `category` ORDER BY `category` ASC, `name` ASC

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT `name`, `brand`, `category`, MIN(price) as min_price, MAX(price) as max_price, SUM(stock_qty) as total_stock, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN flavor IS NOT NULL AND flavor != "" THEN flavor END) as flavors, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN puffs IS NOT NULL THEN puffs END ORDER BY puffs) as puff_counts, MIN(image_url) as image_url, COUNT(*) as variant_count FROM `products` WHERE `is_active` = 1 GROUP BY `name`, `brand`, `category` ORDER BY `category` ASC, `name` ASC
